Read EPUB books, listen to audiobooks, browse comics and manga, and keep your reading life organized in one personal library.

## Your reading life, together

McReader brings books, audiobooks, comics, manga, and reading tracking into one app for iPhone and iPad. Build a library from your own files, choose how you read or listen, and keep your place across devices.

## Read, listen, and explore

- **Books:** Read EPUB files with bookmarks, highlights, notes, in-book search, adjustable typography, scrolling or paginated layouts, and Read Aloud.
- **Audiobooks:** Play M4B and MP3 audiobooks, including folders of chapter files. Use playback speed, sleep timers, bookmarks, AirPlay, background audio, lock-screen controls, and CarPlay.
- **Comics:** Read CBZ files in single-page, vertical-scroll, or two-page spread layouts, with right-to-left reading and zoom controls.
- **Manga:** Discover, follow, stream, and download manga through community-maintained, Paperback-style extensions installed by the user at runtime.

## Pick up where you left off

Reading progress, bookmarks, annotations, tracked books, themes, and manga state can sync through your private CloudKit database. Media stays local by default. Optional media sync can be enabled by category on each device.

## Track more than files

The built-in Tracker organizes books and manga into To Read, Reading, and Read shelves. Record ratings, notes, dates, genres, and reading statistics. Import a StoryGraph CSV, search Google Books or Open Library, and review suggested metadata field by field before applying it.

## Make it yours

Choose built-in themes or create and import custom themes. Device-local parental controls can filter mature manga, hide restricted titles, and require a PIN before opening restricted content.

## Availability

McReader is in active TestFlight development for iPhone and iPad and requires iOS or iPadOS 26.5 or later.
McReader brings EPUB books, audiobooks, comics, manga, and reading tracking together in one app for iPhone and iPad.
